title: Section 26181
text: The State Water Resources Control Board, the Department of Fish and Wildlife, and other agencies may establish fees to cover the costs of their cannabis programs. (Amended by Stats. 2017, Ch. 27, Sec. 98. (SB 94) Effective June 27, 2017. Note: This section was added on Nov. 8, 2016, by initiative Prop. 64.) BPC Business and Professions Code - BPC
